summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of teilzeit-WG webapp. All core features working correctly including dashboard summaries, calendar room occupancy, stay management with check-in/check-out lists, and manual management with image support.
passed_tests: Frontend dashboard loading and summaries display
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Calendar, Stays, Manuals)
Calendar month navigation and occupancy dots display
Stay list display and detail view navigation
Check-in/check-out checklist functionality and item addition
Manual list display and seed functionality
Manual detail view with steps and images
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (all core features working)
